name: Chick-Pea and Vegetable Stew with Couscous
recipeInstructions:
1. Sort and rinse the chickpeas, then soak overnight in water.
2. Drain and cook in 5 cups of water until tender, about 2 to 3 hours.
3. Drain, reserving the broth, and set aside.
4. Warm a cup of the chick-pea broth in a skillet or saucepot and add the onion, garlic, and dried spices.
5. Simmer gently until the onions have begun to soften, about 7 minutes. Don't let the pan dry out or the spices will burn. Add more liquid as needed.
6. Once the onions are soft, add the chickpeas, pepper, squash, juice from the tomatoes, chopped tomatoes, raisins, parsley, and cilantro. Add enough chick-pea broth or water to cover, bring to a boil, then simmer until the vegetables are done and the liquid has reduced, making a nice sauce.
7. Add the green peas during the last 5 minutes.
8. Make the couscous and serve with the vegetables and their sauce. Garnish with cilantro or parsley.
